data.title: Soulection Radio Show #426
data.content:
Joe Kay is back with an eclectic mix inspired by his recent trip to [Joshua Tree](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joshua_Tree_National_Park).

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #424 w/ROMderful
data.content:
[ROMderful](https://soundcloud.com/romderful) comes to the London Beats1 studio to drop a exclusive mix and interview during the Soulection London Sessions.

<!--more-->

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #423 w/ Cay Caleb & K Le Maestro
data.content:
[Cay Caleb.](https://soundcloud.com/caycaleb) and [K, Le Maestro](https://soundcloud.com/klemaestro) takeover Soulection Radio with the UK production and sound from London and Birmingham.

<!--more-->

Follow Cay Caleb. on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/caycaleb), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/caycaleb), [BandCamp](https://caycaleb.bandcamp.com/releases), [TrackTrain](https://traktrain.com/caycaleb#367775), [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/caycaleb/), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/caycalebmusic/), [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/1PG7cNknd6KXeQ4tgyqo8K),

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #422 w/Children of Zeus

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #421 w/ Juls
data.content:
East London's [JulsOnit](https://twitter.com/JulsOnIt) joins Joe Kay to drop an exclusive mix and talk producing hits for Burna Boy, Wizkid, Tay Iwar, and GoldLink.

<!--more-->

Watch the Interview on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QumQJgMEtnY).
